band.name: A Boy Called Hero
band.tagline: Turn it up until your neighbours hate you.

bio.elevator: A Boy Called Hero is a UK pop-punk duo channeling the raw energy and melodic hooks of the early 2000s into anthems for right now.
bio.short: A Boy Called Hero is a UK pop-punk duo forged from friendship, nostalgia, and a shared obsession with the golden era of early 2000s punk. With blistering guitars, huge choruses, and lyrics that cut straight to the heart, they're here to remind you why you fell in love with this sound in the first place.
bio.medium:
A Boy Called Hero is a UK pop-punk duo made up of Richie Lee Simon and Sam Keeble. Born from a friendship built on mixtapes, basement shows, and a mutual obsession with the early 2000s pop-punk golden era, the band channels that same raw, melodic energy into music that feels both nostalgic and urgently modern.

Their debut single, "The Sound of the End," is a anthemic blast of driving guitars, crashing drums, and hooks that refuse to leave your head. It's the sound of late nights, wrong turns, and the kind of friendships that survive them. Recorded with a DIY spirit and a stadium-sized ambition, the track announces A Boy Called Hero as a band unafraid to wear their hearts on their sleeves—and their influences on their denim jackets.

With more releases on the horizon and a live show built on sweat, singalongs, and zero pretension, A Boy Called Hero is ready to soundtrack the next chapter of pop punk.
bio.long:
A Boy Called Hero is a UK pop-punk duo made up of Richie Lee Simon and Sam Keeble. Born from a friendship built on mixtapes, basement shows, and a mutual obsession with the early 2000s pop-punk golden era, the band channels that same raw, melodic energy into music that feels both nostalgic and urgently modern.

Richie and Sam met years before they ever shared a stage. What started as trading favourite albums and debating setlists eventually turned into jam sessions, songwriting marathons, and a shared realisation that they had something to say—and a sound that demanded to be heard. Their chemistry is the kind that can't be manufactured: two friends who finish each other's musical sentences and push each other to go louder, faster, and more honest with every song.

Their debut single, "The Sound of the End," is a blast of driving guitars, crashing drums, and hooks that refuse to leave your head. Lyrically, it walks the tightrope between desperation and defiance—themes that have defined the best pop punk for decades. It's the sound of late nights, wrong turns, and the kind of friendships that survive them. Recorded with a DIY spirit and a stadium-sized ambition, the track announces A Boy Called Hero as a band unafraid to wear their hearts on their sleeves and their influences on their denim jackets.

Drawing from the melodic urgency of Blink-182, the emotional punch of New Found Glory, and the modern edge of bands like Neck Deep and State Champs, A Boy Called Hero isn't interested in nostalgia for nostalgia's sake. They're here to prove that the spirit of pop punk—honest, energetic, and unapologetically loud—is alive and evolving.

With more releases on the horizon and a live show built on sweat, singalongs, and zero pretension, A Boy Called Hero is ready to soundtrack the next chapter of pop punk. Turn it up.

releases.title: The Sound of the End
releases.description: The debut single. A anthemic blast of driving guitars, crashing drums, and hooks that refuse to leave your head.
releases.lyrics:
Verse 1:

Insert a metaphor
Sprinkle on a simile
Ask what this life is for
Top it with a melody
Sing about an ex
How bad they hurt me
Tie it in a bow
In a break up story

Chorus:

I can't forget
The words she said
You hold me down
And I've got to let you go
I can't forget
The words she said
You hold me down
This is the Sound of the End

Verse 2:

A catchy hook
A small piano piece
She's got me shook
I need a symphony
I heard a sound
A rhythm of a timpani
I wrote it down
And this is what she said to me

Chorus:

I can't forget
The words she said
You hold me down
And I've got to let you go
I can't forget
The words she said
You hold me down
This is the Sound of the End
releases.meaning: "The Sound of the End" is very meta, a song about how to write a breakup song, whilst being a breakup song itself. The Sound of the End is the echo of a final conversation, the memory of painful words, and the act of turning heartbreak into music. It captures that strange place where pain becomes art: when the only way to survive the ending is to sing about it.
